tasks.subject: Task 1: OAuth refresh-token grant primitive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `anthropic_oauth` can exchange a refresh token for a fresh bearer via a typed, wiremock-tested async primitive that never logs secrets.

**Files:** Create `crates/anthropic_oauth/src/refresh.rs`; modify `types.rs` (`RefreshedTokens` redacting Debug, `OAuthError::RefreshFailed`/`RefreshTokenMissing`), `client.rs:92` (`pub(crate) fn redact_for_display`), `lib.rs` (mod+re-exports); create `tests/refresh_wiremock.rs`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** 200â†’RefreshedTokens w/ saturating expiry math; non-200â†’RefreshFailed redacted; Debug redacts both tokens; transportâ†’Network; ignored real-endpoint smoke; clippy -D clean.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p anthropic_oauth` green; manual `-- --ignored refresh_real_endpoint_smoke`.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/anthropic_oauth/src/refresh.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/types.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/client.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/lib.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/tests/refresh_wiremock.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p anthropic_oauth && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["200â†’RefreshedTokens with correct expiry math","non-200â†’RefreshFailed with redacted body","RefreshedTokens Debug redacts both tokens","transport errorâ†’Network","ignored real-endpoint smoke present","clippy -D warnings clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Atomic, anti-clobber credential write-back
tasks.description:
**Goal:** persist refreshed tokens back into the existing credentials file per Â§3.4 â€” atomic tmp+rename, perms preserved, only the three token fields touched, never regressing a concurrently-newer on-disk token.

**Files:** modify `crates/anthropic_oauth/src/credentials.rs` (`WriteBack`+`write_back`), `lib.rs` (re-export).

**Acceptance Criteria:** only 3 token fields changed/others preserved; atomic tmp+rename same dir; unix mode preserved/windows documented; SkippedDiskNewer when disk expiresAt>=ours; tmp cleaned on failure; TODO(v0.2) marker.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p anthropic_oauth credentials` green; clippy -D clean.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/anthropic_oauth/src/credentials.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/lib.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p anthropic_oauth && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["only 3 token fields changed, other keys preserved","atomic tmp+rename same dir","unix mode preserved; windows documented","SkippedDiskNewer when disk expiresAt>=ours","tmp cleaned on rename failure","TODO(v0.2) serialization marker present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: CLI refresh composition (pre-flight + 401 retry)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `balanze_cli::fetch_oauth` proactively refreshes when expired/within 5-min margin, persists it, and recovers from a hard 401 with one refresh+retry.

**Files:** modify `crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs` (imports 21-24; replace `fetch_oauth`; add `REFRESH_MARGIN`, `token_needs_refresh`, `refresh_and_persist`; unit test).

**Acceptance Criteria:** pure token_needs_refresh unit-tested; pre-flight refresh+persist+new bearer; exactly one 401 refresh+retry then propagate; missing refreshTokenâ†’RefreshTokenMissing no panic; write_back skip/err non-fatal; no secret logged.

**Verify:** `cargo test --workspace` green; clippy -D clean.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["token_needs_refresh pure+unit-tested","pre-flight refresh+persist+new bearer","exactly one 401 refresh+retry then propagate","missing refreshTokenâ†’RefreshTokenMissing no panic","write_back skip/err non-fatal","no secret in any log line"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Anchor window::summarize_window to optional reset (Â§7 test-first)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `summarize_window` accepts `window_anchor: Option<DateTime<Utc>>`; Some(reset)â†’`[reset-window,reset)`, Noneâ†’unchanged `now-window`. Burn math unchanged.

**Files:** modify `crates/window/src/lib.rs` (6th param; window_start match; doc; 10 in-crate call sites add `None,`; 2 new tests).

**Acceptance Criteria:** new 6th param; None reproduces today exactly; Some(reset)â†’window_start=reset-window, burn still now-relative; Â§7 anchored test fails before impl.

**Verify:** `cargo test -p window` green; clippy -D clean.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/window/src/lib.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p window && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["6th param window_anchor Option<DateTime<Utc>>","None == legacy now-window, all existing tests unchanged","Some(reset)â†’window_start=reset-window, burn still now-relative","Â§7 test-first: new test fails before impl"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Thread OAuth five_hour resets_at into the JSONL window
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `balanze_cli` passes OAuth `five_hour` `resets_at` as the window anchor (fallback None), proven by the integration test.

**Files:** modify `crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs` (`summarize_for_jsonl_snapshot` gains param; `build_snapshot` derives+passes anchor) and `tests/integration_4quadrant.rs` (call site line 125 +`None,`; add `window_anchors_to_supplied_reset`).

**Acceptance Criteria:** summarize_for_jsonl_snapshot gains+forwards window_anchor; build_snapshot derives five_hour resets_at w/ None fallback, no 2nd fetch; integration test asserts anchored window_start; workspace test+clippy+fmt clean.

**Verify:** `cargo test --workspace` green incl. integration_4quadrant.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs","crates/balanze_cli/tests/integration_4quadrant.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check","acceptanceCriteria":["summarize_for_jsonl_snapshot gains+forwards window_anchor","build_snapshot derives five_hour resets_at, None fallback, no 2nd fetch","integration test asserts anchored window_start","workspace test+clippy+fmt all clean"]}
```
